revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-3-060

Oscillatory movement of the sea caused generally by winds at a distance or by winds that existed before the time of observation.


Note: In French an oscillation of the swell is called a lame.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Swell}}
